title: Compliance and Enforcement - Legislation and Regulatory Amendments - Drugs and Health Products - Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Compliance and Enforcement - Legislation and Regulatory Amendments - Drugs and Health Products - Health Canada
Health Canada is responsible for all activities concerning compliance and enforcement of the Food and Drugs Act (FDA) (with the exception of products regulated as foods which are the responsibility of the Canadian Food Inspection Agency (CFIA)) and the Controlled Drugs and Substances Act (CDSA) and their associated Regulations.

## What information can you find here?
This section contains links to information on legislation and regulatory amendments related to compliance and enforcement of the Food and Drugs Act (FDA).
- Legislation and Regulatory Amendments Acts and Regulations Notices & Early Consultation Canada Gazette Parts I & II
- Acts and Regulations
- Notices & Early Consultation
- Canada Gazette Parts I & II
